title: Dr Lal PathLabs is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Dr Lal PathLabs is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!
